requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — EOS (ES) Standard Adopting IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——EOS（ES）采纳IEC 62133的标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——EOS（ES）採納IEC 62133的標準

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs entering Egypt are assessed against Egyptian Standards (ES) issued by EOS, which for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries adopt the international IEC 62133-2 safety standard. EOS-recognised testing covers the IEC 62133 abuse and performance regime (overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, impact, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and is the technical basis on which GOEIC import inspection and any EOS conformity check rely. A test report issued to the adopted IEC 62133 standard by a laboratory whose results EOS accepts is the practical evidence required; a purely domestic Chinese-standard report is not directly recognised. Single-phase mains-charged products operate on Egypt's 220 V, 50 Hz grid (same 50 Hz frequency as China, similar 220 V single-phase nominal voltage).
summary.zh: 进入埃及的便携式锂电芯及电池组，依据EOS发布的埃及标准（ES）评估；针对便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池，该标准采纳国际IEC 62133-2安全标准。EOS认可的检测涵盖IEC 62133的滥用与性能项目（过充、外部短路、挤压、冲击、跌落、热滥用、强制放电），是GOEIC进口检验及任何EOS合格核查所依据的技术基础。由EOS接受其结果的实验室依所采纳IEC 62133标准出具的测试报告，是实务上所需的证据；纯中国国内标准报告不被直接认可。市电充电的单相产品在埃及220 V、50 Hz电网运行（频率与中国同为50 Hz，单相标称电压亦接近220 V）。
summary.zht: 進入埃及的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，依據EOS發布的埃及標準（ES）評估；針對便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池，該標準採納國際IEC 62133-2安全標準。EOS認可的檢測涵蓋IEC 62133的濫用與性能項目（過充、外部短路、擠壓、衝擊、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電），是GOEIC進口檢驗及任何EOS合格核查所依據的技術基礎。由EOS接受其結果的實驗室依所採納IEC 62133標準出具的測試報告，是實務上所需的證據；純中國國內標準報告不被直接認可。市電充電的單相產品在埃及220 V、50 Hz電網運行（頻率與中國同為50 Hz，單相標稱電壓亦接近220 V）。

standards_or_laws: ES (Egyptian Standard) adopting IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems (EOS)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — international base standard adopted by EOS
GOEIC import inspection regime — Ministry of Trade and Industry, Egypt

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287-2013 for mobile-phone cells. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but carries national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory establishes compliance for the Chinese domestic market but is not, by itself, recognised by EOS or GOEIC, which look for results referencing the adopted IEC 62133 standard.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机电芯另有GB 18287-2013。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241报告可证明符合中国国内市场要求，但其本身不被EOS或GOEIC认可——后者要求引用所采纳IEC 62133标准的结果。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機電芯另有GB 18287-2013。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241報告可證明符合中國國內市場要求，但其本身不被EOS或GOEIC認可——後者要求引用所採納IEC 62133標準的結果。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: The substantive test content of GB 31241 and IEC 62133 overlaps heavily, but Egyptian acceptance turns on the standard cited and the recognition route, not on engineering similarity. Key gaps: (1) EOS/GOEIC expect a report against the adopted IEC 62133 standard, so an exporter should obtain IEC 62133-2 testing (ideally via an IECEE CB Scheme certificate that EOS accepts) rather than rely on the GB number; (2) test-severity differences in crush and overcharge mean a GB report may not map cleanly onto IEC clauses; (3) the safety report must be tied to the GOEIC-registered importer and factory to be usable at the border. An existing GB 31241 report supports engineering analysis but does not establish Egyptian conformity on its own.
gap.zh: GB 31241与IEC 62133的实质测试内容大量重叠，但埃及的接受取决于所引用标准与认可路径，而非工程上的相似性。主要差距：（1）EOS/GOEIC要求引用所采纳IEC 62133标准的报告，故出口商应取得IEC 62133-2测试（最好通过EOS接受的IECEE CB体系证书），而非依赖GB编号；（2）挤压与过充的测试严苛程度差异，意味着GB报告未必能干净对应到IEC条款；（3）安全报告须与在GOEIC注册的进口商及工厂绑定，方可在口岸使用。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但本身不能证明埃及符合性。
gap.zht: GB 31241與IEC 62133的實質測試內容大量重疊，但埃及的接受取決於所引用標準與認可路徑，而非工程上的相似性。主要差距：（1）EOS/GOEIC要求引用所採納IEC 62133標準的報告，故出口商應取得IEC 62133-2測試（最好透過EOS接受的IECEE CB體系證書），而非依賴GB編號；（2）擠壓與過充的測試嚴苛程度差異，意味著GB報告未必能乾淨對應到IEC條款；（3）安全報告須與在GOEIC登記的進口商及工廠綁定，方可在口岸使用。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但本身不能證明埃及符合性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an EOS-recognised safety report against the adopted IEC 62133 standard is required for GOEIC import inspection and clearance of portable lithium batteries
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: EOS — Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egyptian market access for portable lithium cells and packs is built on an EOS-recognised safety report against the adopted IEC 62133 standard, used in GOEIC import inspection. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy this, even though the technical content is similar, because EOS/GOEIC look for IEC 62133 results tied to the registered importer and factory. Exporters should obtain IEC 62133-2 testing (commonly via an accepted CB certificate) and confirm the current EOS/GOEIC route with their Egyptian importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 便携式锂电芯及电池组进入埃及，以EOS认可、引用所采纳IEC 62133标准的安全报告为基础，用于GOEIC进口检验。中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足该要求——尽管技术内容相近，因为EOS/GOEIC要求与注册进口商及工厂绑定的IEC 62133结果。出口商应取得IEC 62133-2测试（通常通过被接受的CB证书），并向埃及进口商核实现行EOS/GOEIC路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 便攜式鋰電芯及電池組進入埃及，以EOS認可、引用所採納IEC 62133標準的安全報告為基礎，用於GOEIC進口檢驗。中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足該要求——儘管技術內容相近，因為EOS/GOEIC要求與註冊進口商及工廠綁定的IEC 62133結果。出口商應取得IEC 62133-2測試（通常透過被接受的CB證書），並向埃及進口商核實現行EOS/GOEIC路徑。
